Photos up the trail to longs peak, This one taken about a mile out of chasm lake, sitting at about 11,900ft of elevation.
Photos up the trail to longs peak, This one taken in the rocky terrain right above the standard rocky mountain treeline, the scale up there is deciving.
Photos up the trail to longs peak, This one shows the towerring slabs of rock in the distance over the short shrubs, the only things that can survive the oxygen and wind.
Photos up the trail to longs peak, This one taken less than a quarter mile from the lake, its a small hut ment for search and rescue I belive.
A medow in a short (but stunning) flat marshy part of the hike up longs peak.
Sitting at about 11,900ft of elevation chasm lake has these striking rocky slabs that loom over the lake. Almost gave me hypothermic shock when swimming in it at about 35°F.
The jagged peaks of the rocky terrain that make up the acent to longs peaks summit at about 14,400ft.
